description: New Hinge match — Indian girl with Hinglish bio, chai obsessed, overthinking specialist, photos at a wedding and eating street food
Bumble match — minimal profile, one photo at a music festival, band tee, laughing in a crowd. No bio.
Hinge profile — Neha quit her corporate job to start a bakery at 25. Prompt: 'I geek out on: true crime podcasts and sourdough starters'. Photos show her in a bakery covered in flour.

Bumble profile — Riya, 23. Bio: 'swipe right if you can handle someone who thinks she's funnier than she actually is. also i WILL judge your spotify wrapped'. Photo at an open mic holding a mic mid-punchline.
She just started pottery classes and is obsessed — early conversation, casual getting to know each other
their_last_message: just started pottery classes last month and im literally obsessed... spent 3 hours on saturday just trying to make a bowl that doesnt look like a crime

description: She's a self-confessed night owl — was up till 4am going down a YouTube rabbit hole about cults
their_last_message: im such a night owl its genuinely a problem... was up till 4am last night going down a youtube rabbit hole about how cults recruit people

description: She's giving flat one-word replies — asked about travel, she said 'goa' and nothing more. No energy coming back but hasn't unmatched.
She told a funny story about her cat knocking over her coffee and staring at her like it was her fault
their_last_message: my cat just knocked my coffee off the table and then sat there and stared at me like... what? as if i did something wrong

description: 12 messages in, great banter. She said he's actually funny and most guys on here are so boring — clearly interested, light flirting starting
their_last_message: okay you're actually funny... most guys on here are so boring it hurts. how are you real

description: Playful argument about pineapple on pizza — she's dying on the 'war crime' hill and has declared it a dealbreaker
their_last_message: absolutely not. pineapple on pizza is a war crime and i will die on this hill. unironically a dealbreaker

description: She discovered they both love Khruangbin — very excited, big moment in the chat
their_last_message: WAIT you listen to khruangbin too?? okay we might genuinely be the same person. who got you into them

description: Good conversation 2 weeks ago then she went silent. Now she texted back out of nowhere with no explanation of where she went.
their_last_message: hey sorry been completely mia... life got chaotic. how have you been

description: He asked about her weekend 2 days ago. She just replied with a short low-effort apology — no substance.
He told a decent story about something funny that happened. She replied with just 'lol' — nothing else. Energy dropping for 4 messages now.
Good conversation, he suggested moving to WhatsApp. She pushed back playfully — interested but testing his response.
their_last_message: hmm why should i give you my number tho 🤔

description: Her opening message mocked his generic bio (travel, The Office, tacos). Sarcastic but she initiated — testing confidence, not actually uninterested.
their_last_message: oh wow another guy who loves travel, the office, and tacos... how original 😴

description: Chatting a few days, good rapport. She had a terrible day — boss called out her report in front of the whole team. Seeking connection, not advice.
their_last_message: today was genuinely awful... my boss called out my report in front of the whole team and basically said i was careless. i just want to disappear

description: Deep conversation about trust. She unplanned-overshared that her last relationship left her messed up and it's hard to be open again.
their_last_message: my last relationship kinda left me messed up ngl... its hard to actually be open with someone after that. i dont even know why im telling you this

description: 15+ messages, great banter, shared interests discovered. Peak chemistry moment — she called him the most entertaining person she's matched with.
their_last_message: okay you might actually be the most entertaining person ive matched with... and ive been on here a while so that's saying something

description: Warm conversation. She mentioned being obsessed with finding good coffee and having a ranked list of every cafe in the city — natural opening to ask her out.
their_last_message: honestly i could live off good coffee... i have like a list of every cafe in the city ranked. its a problem
